# משה ה — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Build a modern internal business management web app for a juice and smoothie shop called "18 Karrots".

This is NOT a customer app.
This is an internal management system for the business owners and staff.

The purpose of the system is to give full operational and financial clarity in one place, including:
- income tracking
- expense tracking
- supplier management
- receipt storage
- product costing
- profitability analysis
- event / catering pricing
- business overview dashboard

The business currently has only one branch.
Do not build a franchise system.
Do not build customer ordering features.
Focus only on internal management.

==================================================
CORE GOALS
==================================================

The system should help the business understand:
- total income
- total expenses
- net profit
- cost of goods
- supplier-related expenses
- product profitability
- waste and inefficiency
- smart pricing for events, tastings, gift boxes, and catering

The UI must be very clean, modern, visual, and easy to understand for a non-technical user.
Use cards, charts, summary blocks, filters, and clean tables.
Make the dashboard feel premium and simple.

==================================================
USER ROLES
==================================================

Create these roles:
1. Admin
- full access to everything
- can add/edit/delete all records
- can manage suppliers, products, ingredients, recipes, income, expenses, receipts, and event pricing

2. Staff
- limited access
- can add income and expenses
- can upload receipts
- can view suppliers
- cannot change core settings or delete important data

==================================================
MAIN SECTIONS / PAGES
==================================================

Create the following main pages in the app sidebar:

1. Dashboard
2. Income
3. Expenses
4. Suppliers
5. Receipts
6. Products
7. Ingredients
8. Recipes
9. Profitability
10. Events & Catering Pricing
11. Reports
12. Settings

==================================================
1. DASHBOARD PAGE
==================================================

Create a visual dashboard showing monthly business overview.

Top summary cards:
- Total Income This Month
- Total Expenses This Month
- Net Profit This Month
- Profit Margin %
- Cost of Goods %
- Franchise Fee 5%

Charts:
- Monthly income vs expenses
- Expenses by category
- Expenses by supplier
- Income by source
- Profit trend by month

Widgets / tables:
- Recent expenses
- Recent income
- Low stock alerts
- Upcoming supplier order reminders
- Recent uploaded receipts

Add filters:
- date range
- month
- source
- supplier
- category

==================================================
2. INCOME PAGE
==================================================

Create an Income Management page.

Allow adding income records with the following fields:
- Date
- Source (POS / Kiosk / Wolt / Catering / Events / Other)
- Amount
- Payment Notes
- Reference Number
- Notes

Features:
- add income
- edit income
- delete income
- filter by date and source
- monthly total
- export table

==================================================
3. EXPENSES PAGE
==================================================

Create an Expense Management page.

Allow adding expense records with:
- Date
- Supplier
- Category
- Amount
- Payment Method
- Receipt Image
- Description
- Notes

Expense categories should include:
- Fruits
- Frozen Goods
- Desserts
- Plastic / Packaging
- Cleaning
- Utilities
- Salaries
- Rent
- Equipment
- Marketing
- Other

Features:
- add expense
- edit expense
- delete expense
- attach/upload receipt image
- filter by supplier, category, date
- show monthly expense total
- export table

==================================================
4. SUPPLIERS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Suppliers page.

Each supplier should include:
- Supplier Name
- Category
- Contact Person
- Phone Number
- Email
- Fixed Order Day
- Delivery Time (days)
- Standard Weekly Order Notes
- Products This Supplier Provides
- Reminder Enabled
- Notes

Features:
- supplier list view
- supplier detail page
- add/edit/delete supplier
- supplier category filters
- reminder indicator for ordering day
- show related expenses for each supplier

==================================================
5. RECEIPTS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Receipts page for receipt storage and organization.

Each receipt record should include:
- Receipt Image
- Upload Date
- Expense Date
- Supplier
- Amount
- Category
- Notes

If possible, add basic AI/OCR-ready structure so the system is prepared to support:
- extracting amount
- extracting date
- extracting supplier name

Even if OCR is not fully functional, structure the page and data model for future support.

Features:
- upload receipt image
- view receipt gallery/list
- link receipt to expense
- filter by supplier/date/category

==================================================
6. PRODUCTS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Products page.

Each product should include:
- Product Name
- Category
- Selling Price
- Description
- Active / Inactive

Examples:
- juices
- smoothies
- bowls
- desserts
- catering items
- gift boxes

Features:
- add/edit/delete product
- product list
- product details
- link each product to recipe
- show calculated product cost
- show profit margin

==================================================
7. INGREDIENTS PAGE
==================================================

Create an Ingredients page.

Each ingredient should include:
- Ingredient Name
- Supplier
- Purchase Unit (kg / liter / unit / box)
- Purchase Cost
- Cost Per Unit
- Current Stock
- Minimum Stock Alert
- Notes

Features:
- add/edit/delete ingredient
- track ingredient costs
- track stock level
- low stock alerts
- link ingredient to supplier
- link ingredient to recipes

==================================================
8. RECIPES PAGE
==================================================

Create a Recipes page that connects products to ingredients.

Each recipe row should include:
- Product
- Ingredient
- Quantity Used
- Unit
- Notes

Features:
- multiple ingredients per product
- calculate total product cost automatically from recipe ingredients
- show recipe breakdown for each product

==================================================
9. PROFITABILITY PAGE
==================================================

Create a Profitability page.

This page should show:
- Product Name
- Selling Price
- Total Cost
- Gross Profit
- Profit Margin %
- Cost Percentage

Features:
- sort by most profitable
- sort by least profitable
- identify low-margin products
- visual indicators for good / medium / low margin
- profitability table
- product profit cards

Also include a basic section for:
- waste / inefficiency insights
- high-cost ingredients affecting margins

==================================================
10. EVENTS & CATERING PRICING PAGE
==================================================

Create a page for event pricing, tasting cups, catering, gift boxes, and culinary tours.

Allow creating pricing scenarios.

Each scenario should include:
- Scenario Name
- Product Used
- Base Product Cost
- Number of Servings / Tasting Cups Produced
- Extra Packaging Cost
- Extra Labor Cost
- Transport Cost
- Desired Profit Margin %
- Final Recommended Price

Example logic:
A large smoothie costs 40 NIS and creates 8 tasting cups.
The system should calculate:
- real cost per tasting cup
- extra cost for small cups
- extra labor cost
- recommended selling price while keeping target margin

Features:
- build event pricing scenarios
- save scenarios
- compare scenarios
- suggested quote output

==================================================
11. REPORTS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Reports page.

Include:
- monthly income report
- monthly expense report
- monthly profit summary
- supplier expense report
- product profitability report
- cost of goods report

Add export options:
- CSV
- printable report layout

==================================================
12. SETTINGS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Settings page for:
- business name
- business logo
- franchise fee percentage (default 5%)
- currency (NIS)
- categories management
- user roles and permissions

==================================================
BUSINESS LOGIC
==================================================

Add the following automatic calculations:
- Net Profit = Total Income - Total Expenses
- Franchise Fee = 5% of total income
- Profit Margin % = Net Profit / Total Income
- Product Cost = sum of all ingredient costs in the recipe
- Gross Profit = Selling Price - Product Cost
- Cost Percentage = Product Cost / Selling Price

==================================================
DESIGN REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

Use a clean, modern, premium admin dashboard style.
The business owner is highly visual, so the system must feel very clear and easy to scan.

Design style:
- modern cards
- rounded sections
- clean tables
- soft shadows
- clear spacing
- strong visual hierarchy
- charts and summaries
- mobile responsive
- desktop-first layout
- simple professional color palette
- easy to read Hebrew-friendly layout support

If possible, support RTL layout or prepare the UI to work well for Hebrew content.

==================================================
TECHNICAL / STRUCTURE REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

Please generate:
- full app structure
- all pages
- data models / collections
- relationships between suppliers, expenses, ingredients, recipes, products, and reports
- forms for adding/editing data
- tables and cards for viewing data
- dashboard summaries and charts
- role-based access structure

Start by generating the full working V1 version with these pages fully usable:
1. Dashboard
2. Income
3. Expenses
4. Suppliers
5. Receipts

Then prepare the rest of the pages and structure for V2 and V3:
- Products
- Ingredients
- Recipes
- Profitability
- Events & Catering Pricing
- Reports
- Settings

Make the app feel like a real internal business operating system, not just a simple form app.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
מערכת ניהול עסקי פנימית חכמה לחנות מיצים ושייקים. קבל שקיפות מלאה על הכנסות, הוצאות ורווחיות במקום אחד. פתרונות בריאות לעובדים מרחוק ולעצמאים.

### לוח בקרה
https://example.com/dashboard
לוח בקרה ויזואלי פרימיום שמציג רווח נקי, הוצאות, הכנסות ומגמות חודשיות בזמן אמת. כלים לייזמים חדשניים בישראל שרוצים לנהל עם ראש פנוי ובהירות מלאה.

### הכנסות והוצאות
https://example.com/income-expenses
מעקב מדויק אחר הכנסות והוצאות לפי קטגוריה, ספק ותאריך. ייצא דוחות, צרף קבלות ובדוק את מצב העסק בשנייה. אורח חיים בריא לעצמאים מתחיל בניהול פיננסי נכון.

### ספקים וקבלות
https://example.com/suppliers-receipts
נהל את כל הספקים, ימי ההזמנה, פרטי הקשר והקבלות במקום אחד מסודר. מבנה מוכן לזיהוי חכם של קבלות בעתיד. משה ה פתרונות לעסקים שרוצים סדר תפעולי אמיתי.

### מוצרים, רווחיות ותמחור
https://example.com/products-profitability-pricing
חשב עלות מוצר לפי מתכון, נתח רווחיות לכל פריט וצור תמחור חכם לאירועים, קייטרינג וקופסאות מתנה. פתרונות בריאות לעובדים מרחוק ולעסקי מזון שרוצים לצמוח.

### צור קשר
https://example.com/contact
יש לך שאלה על מערכת הניהול או רוצה להתחיל? צור קשר עם משה ה עכשיו ותקבל מענה מהיר. כלים לייזמים חדשניים בישראל מחכים לך — אל תישאר לבד עם הניהול.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About משה ה
Build a modern internal business management web app for a juice and smoothie shop called "18 Karrots".

This is NOT a customer app.
This is an internal management system for the business owners and staff.

The purpose of the system is to give full operational and financial clarity in one place, including:
- income tracking
- expense tracking
- supplier management
- receipt storage
- product costing
- profitability analysis
- event / catering pricing
- business overview dashboard

The business currently has only one branch.
Do not build a franchise system.
Do not build customer ordering features.
Focus only on internal management.

==================================================
CORE GOALS
==================================================

The system should help the business understand:
- total income
- total expenses
- net profit
- cost of goods
- supplier-related expenses
- product profitability
- waste and inefficiency
- smart pricing for events, tastings, gift boxes, and catering

The UI must be very clean, modern, visual, and easy to understand for a non-technical user.
Use cards, charts, summary blocks, filters, and clean tables.
Make the dashboard feel premium and simple.

==================================================
USER ROLES
==================================================

Create these roles:
1. Admin
- full access to everything
- can add/edit/delete all records
- can manage suppliers, products, ingredients, recipes, income, expenses, receipts, and event pricing

2. Staff
- limited access
- can add income and expenses
- can upload receipts
- can view suppliers
- cannot change core settings or delete important data

==================================================
MAIN SECTIONS / PAGES
==================================================

Create the following main pages in the app sidebar:

1. Dashboard
2. Income
3. Expenses
4. Suppliers
5. Receipts
6. Products
7. Ingredients
8. Recipes
9. Profitability
10. Events & Catering Pricing
11. Reports
12. Settings

==================================================
1. DASHBOARD PAGE
==================================================

Create a visual dashboard showing monthly business overview.

Top summary cards:
- Total Income This Month
- Total Expenses This Month
- Net Profit This Month
- Profit Margin %
- Cost of Goods %
- Franchise Fee 5%

Charts:
- Monthly income vs expenses
- Expenses by category
- Expenses by supplier
- Income by source
- Profit trend by month

Widgets / tables:
- Recent expenses
- Recent income
- Low stock alerts
- Upcoming supplier order reminders
- Recent uploaded receipts

Add filters:
- date range
- month
- source
- supplier
- category

==================================================
2. INCOME PAGE
==================================================

Create an Income Management page.

Allow adding income records with the following fields:
- Date
- Source (POS / Kiosk / Wolt / Catering / Events / Other)
- Amount
- Payment Notes
- Reference Number
- Notes

Features:
- add income
- edit income
- delete income
- filter by date and source
- monthly total
- export table

==================================================
3. EXPENSES PAGE
==================================================

Create an Expense Management page.

Allow adding expense records with:
- Date
- Supplier
- Category
- Amount
- Payment Method
- Receipt Image
- Description
- Notes

Expense categories should include:
- Fruits
- Frozen Goods
- Desserts
- Plastic / Packaging
- Cleaning
- Utilities
- Salaries
- Rent
- Equipment
- Marketing
- Other

Features:
- add expense
- edit expense
- delete expense
- attach/upload receipt image
- filter by supplier, category, date
- show monthly expense total
- export table

==================================================
4. SUPPLIERS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Suppliers page.

Each supplier should include:
- Supplier Name
- Category
- Contact Person
- Phone Number
- Email
- Fixed Order Day
- Delivery Time (days)
- Standard Weekly Order Notes
- Products This Supplier Provides
- Reminder Enabled
- Notes

Features:
- supplier list view
- supplier detail page
- add/edit/delete supplier
- supplier category filters
- reminder indicator for ordering day
- show related expenses for each supplier

==================================================
5. RECEIPTS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Receipts page for receipt storage and organization.

Each receipt record should include:
- Receipt Image
- Upload Date
- Expense Date
- Supplier
- Amount
- Category
- Notes

If possible, add basic AI/OCR-ready structure so the system is prepared to support:
- extracting amount
- extracting date
- extracting supplier name

Even if OCR is not fully functional, structure the page and data model for future support.

Features:
- upload receipt image
- view receipt gallery/list
- link receipt to expense
- filter by supplier/date/category

==================================================
6. PRODUCTS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Products page.

Each product should include:
- Product Name
- Category
- Selling Price
- Description
- Active / Inactive

Examples:
- juices
- smoothies
- bowls
- desserts
- catering items
- gift boxes

Features:
- add/edit/delete product
- product list
- product details
- link each product to recipe
- show calculated product cost
- show profit margin

==================================================
7. INGREDIENTS PAGE
==================================================

Create an Ingredients page.

Each ingredient should include:
- Ingredient Name
- Supplier
- Purchase Unit (kg / liter / unit / box)
- Purchase Cost
- Cost Per Unit
- Current Stock
- Minimum Stock Alert
- Notes

Features:
- add/edit/delete ingredient
- track ingredient costs
- track stock level
- low stock alerts
- link ingredient to supplier
- link ingredient to recipes

==================================================
8. RECIPES PAGE
==================================================

Create a Recipes page that connects products to ingredients.

Each recipe row should include:
- Product
- Ingredient
- Quantity Used
- Unit
- Notes

Features:
- multiple ingredients per product
- calculate total product cost automatically from recipe ingredients
- show recipe breakdown for each product

==================================================
9. PROFITABILITY PAGE
==================================================

Create a Profitability page.

This page should show:
- Product Name
- Selling Price
- Total Cost
- Gross Profit
- Profit Margin %
- Cost Percentage

Features:
- sort by most profitable
- sort by least profitable
- identify low-margin products
- visual indicators for good / medium / low margin
- profitability table
- product profit cards

Also include a basic section for:
- waste / inefficiency insights
- high-cost ingredients affecting margins

==================================================
10. EVENTS & CATERING PRICING PAGE
==================================================

Create a page for event pricing, tasting cups, catering, gift boxes, and culinary tours.

Allow creating pricing scenarios.

Each scenario should include:
- Scenario Name
- Product Used
- Base Product Cost
- Number of Servings / Tasting Cups Produced
- Extra Packaging Cost
- Extra Labor Cost
- Transport Cost
- Desired Profit Margin %
- Final Recommended Price

Example logic:
A large smoothie costs 40 NIS and creates 8 tasting cups.
The system should calculate:
- real cost per tasting cup
- extra cost for small cups
- extra labor cost
- recommended selling price while keeping target margin

Features:
- build event pricing scenarios
- save scenarios
- compare scenarios
- suggested quote output

==================================================
11. REPORTS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Reports page.

Include:
- monthly income report
- monthly expense report
- monthly profit summary
- supplier expense report
- product profitability report
- cost of goods report

Add export options:
- CSV
- printable report layout

==================================================
12. SETTINGS PAGE
==================================================

Create a Settings page for:
- business name
- business logo
- franchise fee percentage (default 5%)
- currency (NIS)
- categories management
- user roles and permissions

==================================================
BUSINESS LOGIC
==================================================

Add the following automatic calculations:
- Net Profit = Total Income - Total Expenses
- Franchise Fee = 5% of total income
- Profit Margin % = Net Profit / Total Income
- Product Cost = sum of all ingredient costs in the recipe
- Gross Profit = Selling Price - Product Cost
- Cost Percentage = Product Cost / Selling Price

==================================================
DESIGN REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

Use a clean, modern, premium admin dashboard style.
The business owner is highly visual, so the system must feel very clear and easy to scan.

Design style:
- modern cards
- rounded sections
- clean tables
- soft shadows
- clear spacing
- strong visual hierarchy
- charts and summaries
- mobile responsive
- desktop-first layout
- simple professional color palette
- easy to read Hebrew-friendly layout support

If possible, support RTL layout or prepare the UI to work well for Hebrew content.

==================================================
TECHNICAL / STRUCTURE REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

Please generate:
- full app structure
- all pages
- data models / collections
- relationships between suppliers, expenses, ingredients, recipes, products, and reports
- forms for adding/editing data
- tables and cards for viewing data
- dashboard summaries and charts
- role-based access structure

Start by generating the full working V1 version with these pages fully usable:
1. Dashboard
2. Income
3. Expenses
4. Suppliers
5. Receipts

Then prepare the rest of the pages and structure for V2 and V3:
- Products
- Ingredients
- Recipes
- Profitability
- Events & Catering Pricing
- Reports
- Settings

Make the app feel like a real internal business operating system, not just a simple form app.

## Target Audience
- יזמים חדשניים
- חובבי בריאות
- עובדים מרחוק

## Industry
General

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
